command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_agent
from perspective_engine import (
    select_template, render_content, journal_threshold_met,
    memory_significance, get_memory_tags
)

repo_root = Path('.')
results = []

sakura   = load_agent('sakura',   repo_root=repo_root)
remy     = load_agent('remy',     repo_root=repo_root)
megabyte = load_agent('megabyte', repo_root=repo_root)
larry    = load_agent('larry',    repo_root=repo_root)
sentinel = load_agent('sentinel', repo_root=repo_root)

# Base tunnel_down event
tunnel_event = {
    'schema_version': '1.0',
    'event_id': 'se-test-i-tunnel',
    'event_type': 'tunnel_down',
    'source_type': 'environment',
    'severity': 'high',
    'ecosystem_time': '2026-06-17T03:00:00+00:00',
    'subject': {'type': 'tunnel', 'name': 'remy.cutegrafiks.com', 'target': '192.168.0.199:8788'},
    'detail': {'outage_duration_seconds': 720, 'outage_started': '2026-06-17T03:00:00+00:00',
               'outage_resolved': '2026-06-17T03:12:00+00:00', 'actor': 'megabyte'},
    'awareness_scope': ['megabyte', 'remy', 'sentinel'],
    'broadcast': False,
}

# I1: Sentinel always gets governance_record
t = select_template(tunnel_event, sentinel, None)
results.append(f'{'PASS' if t == 'governance_record' else 'FAIL'} I1: sentinel template={t}')

# I2: Agent offline → indirect_observer
t = select_template(tunnel_event, remy, None, agent_presence_at_event={'presence_tier':'offline'})
results.append(f'{'PASS' if t == 'indirect_observer' else 'FAIL'} I2: remy-offline template={t}')

# I3: Megabyte is the actor → primary_actor
t = select_template(tunnel_event, megabyte, None)
results.append(f'{'PASS' if t == 'primary_actor' else 'FAIL'} I3: megabyte-actor template={t}')

# I4: Larry always gets commerce_observer
larry_bcast = dict(tunnel_event, broadcast=True, awareness_scope=['megabyte','remy','sentinel','larry'])
t = select_template(larry_bcast, larry, None)
results.append(f'{'PASS' if t == 'commerce_observer' else 'FAIL'} I4: larry template={t}')

# I5: render_content substitutes placeholders
content = render_content(tunnel_event, megabyte, 'primary_actor', None, repo_root)
results.append(f'{'PASS' if 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in content else 'FAIL'} I5: subject name in content: {content[:80]}')

# I6: Factually consistent - same event, different agents, both mention correct tunnel name
c_mega = render_content(tunnel_event, megabyte, 'primary_actor', None, repo_root)
c_sent = render_content(tunnel_event, sentinel, 'governance_record', None, repo_root)
both_have_subject = 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in c_mega and 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in c_sent
results.append(f'{'PASS' if both_have_subject else 'FAIL'} I6: both mention correct tunnel name')

# I7: Template produces non-empty content for each agent
contents = {}
for name, identity in [('megabyte', megabyte), ('remy', remy), ('sentinel', sentinel)]:
    if name in tunnel_event['awareness_scope']:
        presence = {'presence_tier': 'offline'} if name == 'remy' else None
        tmpl = select_template(tunnel_event, identity, None, presence)
        c = render_content(tunnel_event, identity, tmpl, None, repo_root)
        contents[name] = c
all_non_empty = all(len(c) > 10 for c in contents.values())
results.append(f'{'PASS' if all_non_empty else 'FAIL'} I7: all agents get non-empty content')

# I8: Megabyte and Remy contents differ (perspective differs)
results.append(f'{'PASS' if contents.get("megabyte") != contents.get("remy") else 'FAIL'} I9: megabyte != remy content')

# I10: journal_threshold_met → critical event always true
crit_event = dict(tunnel_event, severity='critical')
results.append(f'{'PASS' if journal_threshold_met(crit_event, megabyte, "primary_actor") else 'FAIL'} I10: critical always journals')

# I11: journal_threshold_met → info severity never true
info_event = dict(tunnel_event, severity='info')
results.append(f'{'PASS' if not journal_threshold_met(info_event, megabyte, "direct_witness") else 'FAIL'} I11: info never journals')

# I12: gap_returnee template always journals
gap_event = {
    'schema_version': '1.0', 'event_id': 'se-test-gap-remy',
    'event_type': 'agent_gap_report', 'source_type': 'environment', 'severity': 'high',
    'ecosystem_time': '2026-06-17T09:00:00+00:00',
    'subject': {'type': 'agent', 'name': 'remy'},
    'detail': {'gap_duration_human': '9h 2m', 'events_during_gap_count': 1, 'actor': 'remy'},
    'awareness_scope': ['remy', 'sakura', 'sentinel'], 'broadcast': False,
}
results.append(f'{'PASS' if journal_threshold_met(gap_event, remy, "gap_returnee") else 'FAIL'} I12: gap_returnee always journals')

print()
for r in results: print(r)
passed = sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('PASS'))
failed = sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('FAIL'))
print(f'\nGROUP I: {passed}/{len(results)} passed, {failed} failed')
if failed == 0: print('PERSPECTIVE GATE: PASSED')
"
